task: Audit this landing page and provide 5 specific conversion improvements with expected impact.
expect: Addresses at least headline clarity, CTA design/placement, social proof presence, form friction, and page load performance
Provides expected impact estimates (e.g. percentage lift range) for each recommendation

task: Design an A/B testing roadmap for our signup funnel. We have 10K monthly visitors.
expect: Calculates minimum sample size requirements and estimated test duration given the traffic volume
Prioritises tests by expected impact and provides a sequenced roadmap (not everything at once)
Includes control/variant descriptions with specific hypotheses for each test

task: Our mobile conversion rate is 60% lower than desktop. Diagnose likely causes and propose fixes.
expect: Checks viewport/responsive issues, form usability on mobile, page load time on cellular networks, and touch target sizes
Proposes mobile-specific fixes (e.g. simplified forms, thumb-zone CTA placement, progressive disclosure)
Recommends a measurement plan to validate which fixes have the most impact
